mechanics.text:
EQUIPMENT
CLOTHING Just about every type of clothing character might wear can be found the table on 156, from casual clothes t0 work clothes with several pockets to hold tools ad odds ad ends
two or more bedrooms full kitchen or kitchenette and bar: The largest encompass entire floors ad have private elevators and parking areas_
Base Officer / Enlisted Quarters Military personnel sometimes travel as part of Iarge unit, in which case they will either live in the field or bunk in common quarters Other times, they travel alone or with small detach- ment Every military base has specia transient quarters aside for this_ The type of billeting and service available are on par with standard hotel, though the rates are much less_ Only military personnee and their dependents may take advantage of BOQs or BEQs
FOOD Characters will have to eat, and bars and restaurants also make good settings for meeting contacts. Except where noted_ the costs listed o the table (p. 156 are per meal; Soldiers usually have Iittle choice in where they dine, least while they are on maneuvers; Mess halls are usually only set up in the field for company-sized larger units All active military bases also have them: Many mess halls are notorious for serving poor meals
TRANSPORTATION The vehicles listed below are commonly tound most inhabited planets_ and all use either electric motors Or interna combustion (IC) engines. IC engines are used on poor worlds Or those where petroleum is produced_
HOUSING Housing in the BattleTech universe remarkably similar t0 present-day housing: whether an apartment; condo or house. Likewise military housing the same, whether barracks_ private apartments or prefabricated housing communities
Electric /Motor Bike Motorcycles have between two ad four wheels ad are inexpensive t0 operate
Hotels Tube: The 'tube literally no arger than coffin giving person just enough room to sleep; Complexes full of tubes are often built in spaceports or jumppoint stations_ They are also built in ghettos, giving transients ad other homeless Tree not clean bed The tubes themselves are lockable, with small adjacent compartment for luggage Each floor of one of these complexes can hold up t0 hundred tubes in addition t0 bath: room facilities ad common area_ There no room service and no concierge. Except for those operated on major space stations and aerodromes, most of these tube complexes are rather run down and are often populated by an unsavory crowd (making them great place to find underworld contacts). Dive: Dives are better than tubes as you at least get vate room. Managers often Rive rates Dy the hour; the night or the week; Service poor at best; ad anyone renting oom should not expect clean linens On the other hand_ the resi: dents employees are used to minding their own business, characteristic that makes these hotels popular with people who don' want t0 attract attention Standard: Characters can expect few more amenities from standard hotel. The hotel kept clean; room service available (if expensive) and employees are usually helpful. High-Class: Expensive high class hotels are popular with businessmen and vacationers because of the amenities. They have their own fine-quality restaurant, laundry services compli- mentary transportation t0 ad from major sites_ nelpful and knowledgeable concierge_ private conference rooms ad host of other services These hotels do not easily tolerate disrup tions but they will handle any problems with discretion (offend- ing characters will often face criminal charges ad substantial bill for damages). Luxury Sulte: Most of the top hotels have their uppermost floors dedicated t0 luxury suites_ suite nas large living room;
Sklmmer Tne skimmer personal hovercraft shaped much like three- or four-wheeled motorcycle. It is capable of much greater speeds however; and can traverse just about ay kind of ter- rain , Skimmers are favorites of military scouts and adolescents.
Compact Electric Ground Car An electric car needs t0 be plugged in' few hours recharge its batteries. Alternatively; can run off satchel bat- tery: Most major cities have recharge stations where drivers can swap their drained satchel battery for fully charged one fee An electric car small, seating two man- sized passen: gers _ with small area for cargo
Hovercar Hovercars are arge fast, noisy at least t0 those outside the vehicle and expensive t0 run. Tney employ large hover fans protected by hoverskirt; which are powerful enough physically lift the vehicle off the ground, allowing float on cushion of air Most of these are roomy enough seat four Or more persons in addition to cargo_
Truck Only two people can comfortably fit into truck'$ cab_ but can carry UP to tons Of cargo in its bed-or, in Iieu cargo_ twelve people
Heavy Cargo Hauler Much larger than standard truck heavy cargo hauler can carry oads of up to 20 tons in its trailer
